prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次约12569→10085→9831→16980→4665，2024年因新高考改革过渡出现大幅后移（16980），2025年物理类大幅回升至4665，波动剧 烈；2025年基准约4665名；本省理科/物理类计划2021-2025年分别为8、9、8、6、10人；2026年物理类计划18人，较2025年大幅扩招80%，竞争压力显著 缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第48名，近年排名稳定在44-53区间，属中上游211；2026年声誉评价偏正面，主要因该校教育学领域硕士报 考人气高涨（报录比约5:1），反映社会认可度提升；抖音热度一般（总排名第67）；未见明显投档断档记录；马克思主义理论A+、教育学A+、世界史A+、统计 学A、生态学A-、生物学A-，6个A-及以上学科，师范类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度分化观望，整体平稳；本省2026年考生总数约15.4万，较2025年（约11.6万）大幅增加约32%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约11.08万，竞争基数显著扩大；东北师范大学位于吉林长春，与内蒙古相邻，地域接近性较强，对内蒙古考生有一定吸引力；该校在本省招生占比约1%-1.2%，属中等偏低水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025 年物理类位次大幅回升至4665的强势表现、2026年招生计划大幅扩招80%的缓解效应、以及本省考生总数增加约32%的竞争加剧，扩招幅度远超考生增幅，整体偏向位次后移；同时 声誉偏正面和优势学科吸引力对报考热度有支撑。预测最低位次约6954名，区间6454-7454名。

一档（最难进）
- 化学（郑汝骊试验班）（师范类）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学（师范）、统计学）
- 物理学类（含物理学（师范）、电子信息科学与技术、材料物理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能、教育技术学）
- 生物科学类（含生物科学（师范）、生物技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无其他低分段专业（2026年物理类仅5个招生专业，均为中高分段）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在6454-7454区间内，建议以二档计算机类、生物科学类为主攻方向，一档化学试验班、数学类、物理学类作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（6454以内）可重点冲刺一档王 牌师范类专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 12569 → 10085 → 9831 → 16980 → 4665. In 2024, due to the transition of the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant backward shift (16980). In 2025, the physics category rebounded sharply to 4665, showing drastic fluctuations. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 4665. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 8, 9, 8, 6, and 10 respectively. In 2026, the physics category enrollment plan is 18, an 80% expansion compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. It ranks approximately 48th on the Soft Science main ranking, with a stable range of 44-53 in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is generally positive, mainly due to the high popularity of master's applications in the field of education (application-to-admission ratio about 5:1), reflecting increased social recognition. Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 67th). No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. It has A+ disciplines in Marxist Theory, Education, and World History, A in Statistics, A- in Ecology and Biology, totaling six disciplines at A- or above. Its strength in teacher-training disciplines strongly attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher-training/education majors is mixed and cautious, generally stable. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000). Based on historical proportions, the estimated number of physics category examinees is about 110,800, significantly expanding the competition base. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin, adjacent to Inner Mongolia, with strong regional proximity, attracting some Inner Mongolian examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in the province is about 1%-1.2%, at a moderately low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound of the physics category ranking to 4665 in 2025, the mitigating effect of the 80% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the intensified competition due to a 32% increase in provincial examinees, the expansion far exceeds the examinee growth, overall favoring a backward shift in ranking. At the same time, the positive reputation and strong discipline attractiveness support application popularity. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6954, with a range of 6454-7454.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Chemistry (Zheng Ruli Experimental Class) (Teacher-Training)
- Mathematics Category (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Teacher-Training), Statistics)
- Physics Category (including Physics (Teacher-Training), Electronic Information Science and Technology, Materials Physics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Educational Technology)
- Biological Sciences Category (including Biological Sciences (Teacher-Training), Biotechnology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other low-score majors currently (in 2026, the physics category has only 5 enrollment majors, all in the mid-to-high score range).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings in the 6454-7454 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Computer Category and Biological Sciences Category, with Tier 1 majors like Chemistry Experimental Class, Mathematics Category, and Physics Category as reach options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 6454), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship teacher-training majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2647 → 2048 → 1820 → 3260 → 924. In 2024, due to the transition of the new college entrance examination reform, there was a backward shift (3260), and in 2025, the history category rebounded significantly to 924, showing drastic fluctuations; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 924th place; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 7, 9, 8, 4, and 6 students respectively; the 2026 history category enrollment plan is 10 students, a substantial expansion of 66.7% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.
3. [School Level] 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 48th, with recent rankings stable in the 44-53 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The reputation evaluation for 2026 is generally positive, mainly due to the high popularity of graduate applications in the field of education at this university (application-to-admission ratio approximately 5:1), reflecting an increase in social recognition; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 67th); no obvious records of enrollment gaps; Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, Biology A-, with 6 A- and above disciplines, highlighting strong strength in normal disciplines, which has a strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of normal/education majors is divided and wait-and-see, overall stable; the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is approximately 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,000), with an estimated 43,200 history category examinees based on historical proportions, significantly expanding the competition base; Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin, adjacent to Inner Mongolia, with strong regional proximity, which has a certain appeal to Inner Mongolian examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in this province is about 1%-1.2%, at a moderately low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the history category ranking rebounding to 924 in 2025, the mitigating effect of a substantial 66.7% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the intensified competition due to a 32% increase in the total number of provincial examinees, the expansion rate far exceeds the examinee growth rate, overall favoring a backward shift in ranking; at the same time, the positive reputation and the appeal of advantageous disciplines support application enthusiasm. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1324, with a range of 1085-1563.
